environmentVariables.name: TILA_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API token for authenticating with the tila server

environmentVariables.name: TILA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the tila worker (e.g. https://tila.example.workers.dev)

environmentVariables.name: TILA_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: tila project ID to scope all operations

environmentVariables.name: TILA_MCP_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups to register. Unset = all groups. Recommended lean profile for coordination-only agents: 'core' (tasks, claims, gates, signals, summary, presence, journal - 20 tools, ~47% fewer always-on tokens). Valid groups: tasks, claims, gates, signals, artifacts, records, presence, journal, schema, templates, summary, core.
